title: Catevala angolensis
uses: Catevala angolensis, also known as the Angolan katikivisky, is a plant that has been used in traditional medicine. Its medicinal uses include the treatment of various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The plant's extracts are believed to possess anti-inflammatory properties, which may contribute to its therapeutic effects. Additionally, Catevala angolensis is used to treat digestive problems and as an antiseptic agent. More research is needed to confirm the plant's full range of medicinal applications.
